creator: asomers@FreeBSD.org
text:
textproc/ruby-libxml and textproc/rubygem-libxml-ruby refer to the same package.  However, textproc/ruby-libxml refers to the old hosting site, rubyforge.org.  New releases haven't appeared there since March-2009.  textproc/rubygem-libxml-ruby refers to the currently maintained hosting site, rubygems.org.  ruby-libxml should probably be deleted.

Fix: 

Delete textproc/ruby-libxml from ports.
How-To-Repeat: n/a
